            Property in Pimple Saudagar, Pune

            You can get a property for sale in Pimple Saudagar at a price range of ₹35.5 Lac - ₹3.58 Cr. Some of the popular localities around Pimple Saudagar are Sus, Old Sangvi, Wakad Road, Pashan, Balewadi offering great options for a Property. 21.31% properties for sale in Pimple Saudagar lie in range of ₹80 Lac- ₹1 Cr while 20.95% properties for sale lie in range of ₹60 Lac- ₹80 Lac. 96.17% properties in Pimple Saudagar are Flats while 2.19% properties are Villas.

            This ready to move-in 3 BHK flat is available for sale at the premium Pimple Saudagar locality in Pune.Located in Legacy Lifespaces Sai Aura, this flat is equipped with premium facilities. This ready to move flat is offered at a price of ₹1.70 Cr. Situated on 6 floor, the flat provides carpet area 1076 sqft. The building encompasses 7 floor and includes Kids play area. This property includes power back up, reserved parking, security, service/goods lift, intercom facility, ro water system. This is a RERA approved project and P52100051930 is the RERA number. The pricing in Legacy Lifespaces Sai Aura varies from ₹1.10 Cr - ₹2.52 Cr, offering units in 2,3,4 bhk flats configurations. Nearby Landmark: Close to Kunal Icon Road, providing easy access to Aundh and Baner. The availability was verified on 14 May 2026. View Property

            Property in Pimple Saudagar, Pune FAQs

            • How much does a 3BHK flat cost in Pimple Saudagar, Pune?

              The price of a 3 BHK flat in Pimple Saudagar Pune ranges from ₹ 20 lakhs to ₹ 13.50 Cr, depends on locality, flat size, BHK type, and amenities.

            • Which is the best place to buy property in Pimple Saudagar Pune?

              Baner, Wakad, Balewadi, Pimple Saudagar and Mahalunge are some of the best places to buy property in Pimple Saudagar.

            • How many properties for sale in Pimple Saudagar Pune?

              Take a look at over 500+ properties for sale in Pimple Saudagar. Pimple Saudagar has 500+ flats, 10+ luxury villas and 10 independent houses avaliable for sale that offer great connectivity and good amenities.

            • How many resale properties in Pimple Saudagar, Pune?

              Choose for over 300+ resale flats in Pimple Saudagar, both furnished and unfurnished, you can find great deals on as many as 300+ resale properties in Pimple Saudagar.

            • What is the price of property in Pimple Saudagar, Pune?

              Property rates in Pimple Saudagar Pune vary significantly by property types. The price of flats in Pimple Saudagar range between ₹ 20 lakhs - ₹ 13.50 Cr, and houses price between ₹ 12.2 lakhs - ₹ 5.72 Cr, with 1-5 BHK options. However, land prices in Pimple Saudagar ranges between ₹ 550 - ₹ 20,011 per sq.ft.

            • How to find property for sale in Pimple Saudagar by owners?

              You can find 500+ owner properties in Pimple Saudagar on MagicBricks. Refine by price, BHK, and amenities, and contact owners directly via call or inquiry.

            • Are property prices going down in Pimple Saudagar, Pune?

              No, property prices in Pimple Saudagar are not declining. Property rates have increased by 1% QoQ (month–month year), driven by strong demand, steady market growth, and ongoing infrastructure development.

            • How much does a 2BHK flat cost in Pimple Saudagar, Pune?

              The price of a 2 BHK flat in Pimple Saudagar Pune ranges from ₹ 20 lakhs to ₹ 13.50 Cr, significantly depends on BKH configuration, flat size, and amenities.

            • What is the price of land in Pimple Saudagar, Pune?

              Land price in Pimple Saudagar Pune is ₹ 550 / sq.ft., significantly based on infrastructure development, and proximity to famous landmarks.

            • How many ready-to-move properties in Pimple Saudagar Pune?

              There are about 300+ ready-to-move flats in Pimple Saudagar. These ready-to-move properties in Pimple Saudagar offer great security, amenities and infrastructure to help you live better.

            • How much does a flat cost in Pimple Saudagar, Pune?

              The cost of a flat in Pune ranges from ₹ 16 lakhs to ₹ 15.57 Cr, depending on the BHK configuration, flat size, and available amenities.

            • How many villas are available for sale in Pimple Saudagar Pune?

              There are about 8 villas available in Pimple Saudagar. These villas offer premium facilities and are located in the proximity of nearby hotspots.

            • How many houses are available for sale in Pimple Saudagar Pune?

              There are 6 houses available for sale in Pimple Saudagar. These houses offer comfortable living with all modern amenities.

            • How many apartments are available for sale in Pimple Saudagar Pune?

              You can choose from over 500+ apartments available for sale in Pimple Saudagar. Equipped with modern amenities along with great connectivity, these apartments in Pimple Saudagar are a great residential choice.

            • How to know the property value in Pune?

              Use MagicBricks Propworth Pune tool to check the value of your property. Propworth is an advanced property valuation tool designed to help you know the estimated property price in Pune.
